caribbean.headline: Moderate Winds and Rain Affect Western Caribbean Ports
caribbean.paragraph: Grand Cayman is experiencing sustained winds of 20 knots with wave heights reaching 5.7 feet and an east-dominant swell period of 7 seconds. Rain probability is elevated at 66 percent, while Nassau reports slightly stronger winds at 24 knots but less significant wave activity.

mediterranean.headline: Calm Seas and Moderate Winds Across Mediterranean Ports
mediterranean.paragraph: Cadiz is experiencing moderate westerly winds sustained at 20 knots with wave heights reaching 4.2 feet and a swell period of 10 seconds, presenting benign marine conditions without any advisories. Meanwhile, Mykonos remains calm with no measurable winds and minimal precipitation expected, maintaining tranquil conditions in the eastern Mediterranean.
